title: 20cm Natural Grapevine Wreath - Vine Branch Rattan Wreath for DIY Christmas Craft, Front Door Wall Hanging, Wedding and Party Decors（3 Pack ）
features: Package-Includes 3 pack wire wreath frames measuring approx. 20 cm in diameter.The enough quantity and suitable size are good for meeting your various needs.
Natural Material: Each grapevine wreathes are hand-woven with natural grapevine, which are environmentally friendly, durable, decorative, long-lasting and reusable.
Feature: The wreaths are good finish, no spots, uniform dyeing,hand-woven full of ancient craft style.

Easy to Use Floral Wreath Frame: Floral grapevine wreath is perfect for floral hoop wreath, dream catcher, macrame craft, plant hangers and other crafts. You can use cotton, fabrics, curtains, ribbons, and other materials with vine branch wreath to create a variety of exquisite crafts

Wide Applications: Suitable for theme parties, exhibitions, weddings, holidays, etc. Ideal decorations for decorating front doors, walls, windows, Christmas door wreath, dinner tables and fireplaces or other places you like. Create a simple and rustic farm atmosphere
description: -- Prefect for hanging, placed, also suit for pet toys, especially birds parrot cage chew toy -- Add leaves, flowers, ornaments, bells, and dolls to decorate wreaths and hang them on doors, walls, windows, and showcases to create a strong festive atmosphere. -- Add what you like and decorate it in the style you want, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, wedding, birthday, etc. Become your shooting props and background, unique photography skills.
